title: Senior Investment Banker at Punjab National Bank

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at Punjab National Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Punjab National Bank! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Punjab National Bank:
Punjab National Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Punjab National Bank!
